wikitext:
{{Relic Infobox|Pendulum|2}}
{{R|Pendulum||2}} is a {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Common|Common|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}}.

== Sources ==
* Can be dropped by fighting {{2|Elites}}, by buying from the {{2|Merchant}} or from {{2|Mechanics#Chests|Chests}}. See Chest and non-Chest chance at {{2|Relics}}.

* Can be obtained from the relics {{R|Calling Bell||2}}, {{R|Shovel||2}} and {{R|Black Star||2}}.
<!--
* Can be obtained from the following events:
TODO: FIND RELIC SOURCES FROM EVENTS
-->

== Interactions ==
=== Order ===
*{{R|Pendulum||2}}'s additional draw for turn occurs ''after'' the following triggers:
**{{C|Tools of the Trade||2}}
**{{C|Tyranny||2}}
**{{C|Entropy||2}}
**{{C|Mayhem||2}}
***While {{C|Mayhem||2}}'s trigger doesn't inherently deal in hand information, it ''could'' potentially play a card that affects the player's hand in some way (selective discard or {{KW|Exhaust||2}}, for example.).
*{{R|Pendulum||2}}'s additional draw for turn occurs ''before'' the following triggers:
**{{R|History Course||2}}
***Similar to {{C|Mayhem||2}}, {{R|History Course||2}} could potentially play a card wherein hand information matters.
===Synergies===
*{{R|Pendulum||2}} syncs up perfectly with {{R|Happy Flower||2}}.
== Update History ==
*'''Early Access v0.103.2'''
**BETA changes incorporated into main branch.
* '''Early Access v0.101.0 (BETA)'''
** Reworked Pendulum relic: "Common - Whenever you shuffle your Draw Pile, draw a card." -> "Common - Every 3 turns, draw 1 card."
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Pendulum to the game.
